No Poverty.reason: No course content or objectives relate to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No course content or objectives relate to food security or hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Course explicitly promotes physical fitness, self-protection, and increased confidence, directly supporting physical and mental well-being (Target 3.4). Both models converged on this score.

Quality Education.reason: Course fosters lifelong learning attitudes and practical self-defense skills, contributing to relevant life skills and continuous education (Targets 4.4, 4.7). A score between models' original values is appropriate.
evidence: 養成自主與終身學習的態度與策略

Gender Equality.reason: The co-ed format and self-defense training empower individuals, particularly contributing to safety and reducing violence (Target 5.2). Both models converged on this score.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No course content or objectives relate to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No course content or objectives relate to energy access or sustainability.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No course content or objectives relate to employment, economic growth, or work conditions.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No course content or objectives relate to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Course objectives explicitly promote tolerance, communication, and teamwork among diverse individuals, fostering social inclusion (Target 10.2). Model B's original score and reasoning were strong.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No course content or objectives relate to urban development or community sustainability.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No course content or objectives relate to consumption, production, or resource management.

Climate Action.reason: No course content or objectives relate to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No course content or objectives relate to marine ecosystems or aquatic life.

Life on Land.reason: No course content or objectives relate to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Self-defense training and self-protection concepts directly contribute to reducing violence and enhancing personal safety (Target 16.1). Both models converged on this score.
evidence: 建立正確的自我保護理念

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No course content or objectives relate to global partnerships or cooperation mechanisms.
